name: C2xSecCertificateGetHashedId8
title: C2xSecCertificateGetHashedId8
syntax: long C2xSecCertificateGetHashedId8( long certificateHandle, byte hashedId8[] );
description: Gets HashedId8 digest of a certificate.

parameters.name: hashedId8
parameters.description: Buffer in which the digest is copied, size must be 8 bytes: In some protocols this parameter is called certId8.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
